creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text: I think this can probably be addressed by changing `zfsctl_ctldir_mode` (sys/contrib/openzfs/module/os/freebsd/zfs/zfs_ctldir.c) to `S_IRUSR | S_IXUSR` (or `S_IRUSR | S_IXUSR | S_IRGRP | S_IXGRP`) with a loader tunable, so the .zfs is only accessible by root (or root plus the wheel group).
